name: Seine-Saint-Denis (France)
description: Per fess: above, blue strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis; below, red charged with a white cogwheel, three gold wheat ears and a white chevron at the base.
history: The fleurs-de-lis recall the royal abbey of Saint-Denis, while the cogwheel and wheat ears stand for the department's industry and agriculture.

features.role: field per fess blue and red
